result.stdout:
LocalAppVeyor 0.6.0+7e21c507779deca51965f1b3efc33e29a251792b

LocalAppVeyor allows one to run an appveyor.yml build script locally

Usage: LocalAppVeyor [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -v|--version  Show version information.

Commands:
  build         Executes appveyor.yml's build jobs from specified repository
                directory
  jobs          List all build jobs available to execution
  lint          Validates appveyor.yml YAML configuration. It requires internet
                connection.

Run 'LocalAppVeyor [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

LocalAppVeyor 0.6.0+7e21c507779deca51965f1b3efc33e29a251792b

LocalAppVeyor allows one to run an appveyor.yml build script locally

Usage: LocalAppVeyor [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -v|--version  Show version information.

Commands:
  build         Executes appveyor.yml's build jobs from specified repository
                directory
  jobs          List all build jobs available to execution
  lint          Validates appveyor.yml YAML configuration. It requires internet
                connection.

Run 'LocalAppVeyor [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Executes appveyor.yml's build jobs from specified repository directory

Usage: LocalAppVeyor build [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -d|--dir      Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
                specified current directory is used
  -j|--job      Job to build. You can specify multiple jobs. Use 'jobs' command
                to list them all
  -s|--skip     Step to skip from the build pipeline step. You can specify
                multiple steps.

commands.payload:
Executes appveyor.yml's build jobs from specified repository directory

Usage: LocalAppVeyor build [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -d|--dir      Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
                specified current directory is used
  -j|--job      Job to build. You can specify multiple jobs. Use 'jobs' command
                to list them all
  -s|--skip     Step to skip from the build pipeline step. You can specify
                multiple steps.

result.stdout:
Validates appveyor.yml YAML configuration. It requires internet connection.

Usage: LocalAppVeyor lint [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -t|--token    Your AppVeyor account API token. If not specified it tries to
                get it from LOCALAPPVEYOR_API_TOKEN environment variable. You
                can find your API token here: https://ci.appveyor.com/api-token.
  -d|--dir      Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
                specified current directory is used

commands.payload:
Validates appveyor.yml YAML configuration. It requires internet connection.

Usage: LocalAppVeyor lint [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.
  -t|--token    Your AppVeyor account API token. If not specified it tries to
                get it from LOCALAPPVEYOR_API_TOKEN environment variable. You
                can find your API token here: https://ci.appveyor.com/api-token.
  -d|--dir      Local repository directory where appveyor.yml sits. If not
                specified current directory is used
